mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO metric_data_1m (instance_id, metric_code, value, collect_time) VALUES
(#{it.instanceId}, #{it.metric}, #{it.value}, to_timestamp(#{it.timestampMillis} / 1000.0))
ON CONFLICT (instance_id, metric_code, collect_time) DO UPDATE SET value = EXCLUDED.value

INSERT INTO metric_data_1h (instance_id, metric_code, value, collect_time) VALUES
(#{it.instanceId}, #{it.metric}, #{it.value}, to_timestamp(#{it.timestampMillis} / 1000.0))
ON CONFLICT (instance_id, metric_code, collect_time) DO UPDATE SET value = EXCLUDED.value

INSERT INTO metric_data_1d (instance_id, metric_code, value, collect_time) VALUES
(#{it.instanceId}, #{it.metric}, #{it.value}, to_timestamp(#{it.timestampMillis} / 1000.0))
ON CONFLICT (instance_id, metric_code, collect_time) DO UPDATE SET value = EXCLUDED.value
